success
The diff in the review payload only shows execution-evidence files, but the result_rev (4db9abea) contains the actual styling work: 99 insertions/111 deletions in sessions/+page.svelte plus three new utility classes (badge-billing-*, alert-caution) in app.css using existing tier/priority CSS vars. All description targets (mono-code IDs, sharp status badges, label-caps headers, hairline dividers, bg-surface rows) are implemented with consistent dark-mode variants.
